items.summary_cn: SpaceX reportedly showed investors a "handset-like" AI device before going public. It could be another signal SpaceX wants to expand into wireless.

items.title_cn: Ashton Kutcher leaving Sound Ventures to launch new VC firm with Morgan Beller
items.title_en: Ashton Kutcher leaving Sound Ventures to launch new VC firm with Morgan Beller
items.summary_cn: Sound built its reputation on concentrated, high-conviction bets in category-leading AI labs, while Kutcher's new fund appears to be chasing the layer underneath those companies — the infrastructure and energy that power them.
items.summary_en: Sound built its reputation on concentrated, high-conviction bets in category-leading AI labs, while Kutcher's new fund appears to be chasing the layer underneath those companies — the infrastructure and energy that power them.
